log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 1 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20(ADV):11+6=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
REASONING: Cone of Cold on 1 targets! 8d8 cold damage.
ACTION: Cast Cone of Cold (Level 5 slot, 2 remaining). DC 17 CON save. 60ft cone.
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Archmage (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Archmage.
→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:8+6=14 vs DC 15] FAIL!
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:5+6=11 vs DC 15] FAIL. Still paralyzed.
--- Leonin — Iron Concentration --- HP: 52/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person
REASONING: All 1 enemies disabled by Hold Person. Dodging to maintain concentration.
ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:8+6=14 vs DC 15] FAIL. Still paralyzed.
--- Leonin — Iron Concentration --- HP: 52/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person

END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:10+6=16 vs DC 15] SUCCESS! No longer paralyzed!
--- Leonin — Iron Concentration --- HP: 52/67 | AC: 14 | Conc: Hold Person

→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:12+6=18 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
